title: Incident Response Timeline
description: Schema readiness for incident response timelines, covering event timestamping, action logging, milestone tracking, and timeline visualization.

fields.name: event_timestamp_schema
fields.purpose: Schema for event timestamps and temporal ordering

fields.name: action_log_schema
fields.purpose: Schema for logging actions taken during incident response

fields.name: milestone_tracking_schema
fields.purpose: Schema for tracking key milestones in the incident lifecycle

fields.name: timeline_export_schema
fields.purpose: Schema for exporting timeline data for post-incident review

safety_notes: Schema readiness only. No real incident response timeline, no event logging, no timeline visualization. Timeline remains non-functional.
